Title: Mehndi
Attire: Festive & colorful — Indian attire encouraged, comfort first
Details: An evening of henna, music, and sweets at home. Come ready to sit for mehndi and stay for the food.

Title: Vidhi & Pithi
Attire: Traditional Indian attire encouraged — yellows welcome for pithi
Details: Pre-wedding ceremonies with the family. Fair warning: turmeric may be involved.

Title: Rehearsal Dinner
Details: For immediate family and the bridal party.

Title: Wedding Ceremony
Attire: Shades of green & gold encouraged (optional) — Indian or Western
Details: Please be seated by 9:45 AM. Lunch to follow the ceremony.

Title: Cocktail Hour & Reception
Venue: Diplomat & Palladian Ballrooms — Omni Shoreham Hotel
Attire: Glam — tuxedos, gowns, heavy lehengas & sherwanis welcome
Details: Cocktail hour in the Diplomat Ballroom, then dinner and dancing in the Palladian Ballroom until 11 PM.
